notes: US-based safety-science and standards organization. Publishes the UL 2900-series cybersecurity-for-products standards (UL 2900-1 general; UL 2900-2-1 healthcare; UL 2900-2-2 industrial control; UL 2900-2-3 life-safety signaling). Paid.

match_nodes.description: UL 2900-series — Software Cybersecurity for Network-Connectable Products

data.official_name: UL 2900 - Standard for Software Cybersecurity for Network-Connectable Products
data.notes: Paid. UL 2900-1 (general); UL 2900-2-1 (healthcare and wellness systems); UL 2900-2-2 (industrial control systems); UL 2900-2-3 (security and life safety signaling).
